description: A testbench that drives stimulus but has no assertions or scoreboard, so it passes even when the DUT is broken.
body: Failure mode: the testbench applies inputs and prints/plots outputs but never compares against expected values, so injected bugs still 'pass'. Detection signals: no scoreboard or assertions in the bench; tests pass after deliberately breaking the DUT; verification relies on manual waveform review. Do not treat a stimulus-only bench as verification. Safer fallback: add a reference model and a scoreboard or SVA that fails on mismatch, verify it catches an injected fault, and track functional coverage.
